node.statement: MAT-TENSOR-001: For finite complex matrices E1 and E2, if E1^*E1=I and E2^*E2=I, then their Kronecker tensor product satisfies (E1 tensor E2)^*(E1 tensor E2)=I. This is the two-factor finite-matrix core of `summary.tex` §11.2 N-factor block tensor isometry ([[def:refmap]] product structure); it is not the full categorical N-factor block tensor theorem. Proven in Lean at Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/Tensor.lean and checked by Julia/WolframScript.
